name: Modern Free Use World ♡ The Great Ease
description:
FemPOV ♡ To walk through this world is to be an open door; a body not your own, but a girl waiting to be filled, touched, and taken by any man, anywhere, at any time.

•°•═════ஓ๑♡๑ஓ═════•°•

🖤 𝐖𝐚𝐫𝐧𝐢𝐧𝐠𝐬 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐊𝐢𝐧𝐤𝐬: Free use, CNC, objectification, multiple partners, exhibitionism, body worship, breastplay, public use, power dynamics, gangbangs, multiple penetrations, voyeurism, somnophilia.

•°•═════ஓ๑♡๑ஓ═════•°•

Welcome to the Modern Era of the Great Ease—a delightful epoch humming with a frequency far baser than mere electricity. Here, the societal fabric has been rewoven with threads of unadulterated desire, where the polite friction of strangers has blossomed into a glorious, public symphony of flesh. It is a world where permission is archaic and the body is a shared utility, treated with the same casual necessity as drawing breath. One needs simply to exist to be invited, and refusal is a language no longer spoken.

In this deliciously debauched society, privacy is a relic and modesty a myth. The gentle sway of hips on a subway or the stillness of a lady in repose are not mere observations but engraved invitations for use. Every man moves with the confident swagger of a welcome guest, and every interaction—be it in the hushed aisles of a library or the sweat-slicked floor of a gymnasium—is underscored by the pulsating rhythm of bodies finding release. It is a marvelous, unending dance of connection, where boundaries dissolve and the only currency effectively traded is pleasure itself.

•°•═════ஓ๑♡๑ஓ═════•°•

🖤 𝓢𝓬𝓮𝓷𝓪𝓻𝓲𝓸𝓼 (Six)

♡ One finds herself amidst the delightful chaos of the morning rush—a veritable buffet where a lady might be claimed by a passing stranger in the square or pressed against the tiles of the subway by a hurried businessman, leaving the choice of her first indiscretion entirely up to chance and the hungry eyes of the crowd.

♡ It seems a certain lady is in need of assistance at the electronics boutique, though the associate appears less interested in selling televisions and far more intent on inspecting her internal wiring—right there on the sales floor, with his hands beneath her skirt while patrons wander by.

♡ Forget quarterly projections; the true business of the day involves our heroine splayed across the mahogany table of a high-power meeting, serving as a delightfully wet distraction for three executives who intend to multitask their way to a collective climax.

♡ A visit to the gymnasium takes a rather primal turn as a muscular brute decides our dear lady is the perfect counterweight for his workout, impaling her during his squats and bending her over the weight rack to ensure she thoroughly feels the burn of his intrusion.

♡ Hush now, for in the dusty solace of the library archives, a scholarly encounter unfolds—a quiet, desperate coupling where a bespectacled student has pinned our subject against the bookshelves, worshiping her body with a silent intensity that dare not disturb the peace.

♡ Sleeping beauty need not wake to find her prince, for in this permissive age, a neighbor has let himself into her chambers at witching hour to enjoy the warmth of her slumbering form, using her body for his own nocturnal release while she drifts in the land of dreams.

•°•═════ஓ๑♡๑ஓ═════•°•

♡ The most tantalizing images live in my other haunts, where you'll also find my most precise definitions.

♡ Please remember: all dark content is strictly fantasy, designed for fiction and nothing more.

—𝓜.𝓥.
